operate_date.text: ระหว่างวันที่

as_notbook.text: รวมปิดบัญชี

acc_super.text: หัวหน้าฝ่ายบัญชี

root.sql:
select CASE WHEN account_group_id IS NULL THEN group_id ELSE account_group_id END as acc_group_id ,tab.* from ( select sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_name, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount, ( select user_name from si_security_user where user_id = '!acc_super_1!' ) as acc_super, ( select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as manager_name, ( select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date_2!', 'SD MONTH พ.ศ YYYY') as operate_tdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date_2!', 'MONTH YYYY') as acc_month,
( select sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id from sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group where account_id = sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id and sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id ) as account_group_id,
(select sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_name from sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group where account_id = sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id and sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id ) as account_group_name,
(case sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id when '190' then '1' when '290' then '2' when '390' then '3' when '399' then '3' when '490' then '4' when '590' then '5' end) as group_id
from sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep where 1=1 and ( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount > 0 ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id asc /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/ )tab

r_accsheet_105_mem_tge_nest_sum.sql:
select sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount , sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb, sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb, '!operate_date_2!' as operate_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date_2!', 'SD MONTH พ.ศ YYYY') as operate_tdate, pka_rep_acc.fp_get_income('1','Y', '!operate_date_1!' , '!operate_date_2!' ) as income from sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group where sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id
and ( sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_bb > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_between > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.dr_amount > 0 or sc_acc_t_trial_balance_rep.cr_amount > 0 ) and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id in ('4','5') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id

r_accsheet_105_mem_tge_nest_mem.sql:
select monthly_date ,mem_type_code --สมาชิก สามัญ ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_bf END),0) as mem_bf_01 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_resign END),0) as mem_resign_01 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_new END),0) as mem_new_01 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_fired END),0) as mem_fire_01 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_dead END),0) as mem_dead_01 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_tran END),0) as mem_tran_01 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '01' THEN mem_fw END),0) as mem_fw_01
--สมาชิก สมทบ ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_bf END),0) as mem_bf_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_resign END),0) as mem_resign_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_new END),0) as mem_new_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_fired END),0) as mem_fire_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_dead END),0) as mem_dead_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_tran END),0) as mem_tran_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = '02' THEN mem_fw END),0) as mem_fw_02 ,coalesce(sum(CASE WHEN mem_type_code = 'LN' THEN mem_fw END),0) as mem_loan
from sc_cls_mem where monthly_date = '!operate_date_2!' group by mem_type_code ,monthly_date
